title: Curriculum vitae
body:
## [Adrià Julià Lundgren](http://www.xarop.com/about/)

[![](http://www.xarop.com/dev/wp-content/uploads/2008/04/ajl100.jpg "Adrià Julià Lundgren")](http://www.xarop.com/about/)

### Front End Developer

11/09/1968  
C/ Diluvi, 8, 2o1a - 08012 BARCELONA  
+34 620 58 26 26  
[www.xarop.com  
](http://ajl.xarop.com/)*[ajl@xarop .com](mailto:ajl@xarop.com)*

[![Adrià Julià Lundgren's LinkedIn profile](http://www.linkedin.com/img/webpromo/btn_viewmy_160x25.gif)](http://www.linkedin.com/in/xarop)

*[  
](mail:ajl@xarop.com)*

**PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE**

***2009 - present*  
*Freelance*****:  
**

**Design and development of the new website of [adamo.es] (http://www.adamo.es)**

**Web design for [Socialtec](http://www.socialtec.es "Group of companies that develops projects under a model of collaboration and codevelopment in the field of social technologies"), design and prototyping *frontend* of the site of *elearning* [witttcamp.com] (http://www.wittcamp.com). Tourist websites 2.0 such as the [Community Hosteltur] (http://comunidad.hosteltur.com), the portal of the Canary Island of [La Palma] (http://www.lapalma.es/) and vertical communities such as [post55] (http://www.post55.es "Community for parents" or) [econred](http://econred.es "The community for self-employed and SMEs") for self-employed and SMEs.**

**Implementation of blogs *WordPress* for [Activotrade](http://www.activotrade.com/) and other personal projects such as [denenos.com](http://www.denenos.com), [casisi.com](http://www.miminipc.com), [miminipc.com](http://www.miminipc.com/) [flood.com](http://www.flood.com).**

*2008 - 2009  
**Web design** in [Telefonica I+D](http://www.tid.es):  
Design, layout and programming of* *mockups* or prototypes of websites based on social networks.  
Agile development with SCRUM.  
HTML5, CSS3, jQuery, PHP.

*2006 - 2008*  
***Web******master*** and **[Vueling Airlines](http://www.vueling.com/)**:  
Development, realization and maintenance of the sections of [hotel reservation] (http://www.vueling.com/hotels/) and [car rental] (http://www.vueling.com/cars/) and various functions in maintenance, design and layout of the *website* [vueling.com/www.com/cars/), both in marketing areas (newsletters, promotions) such as in the buying process.

*2002-2005*  
***Web******master*** ***freelance***:  
Development, among others, of the *websites* of the Canary Islands Pain Congress 2005 and the tourist complex Serenity Amadores.  
Development (programming and Flash integration) of the *website* of the company Miquel Rius ([miquelrius.com](http://www.miquelrius.com/))  
Development (programming and Flash integration) of the official *web* of Agatha Ruiz de la Prada ([agatharuizdelaprada.com](http://www.agatharuizdelaprada.com/))  
Project manager (design, programming, implementation, maintenance, management, ...) of the portal on mental illness [esquizo.com] (http://www.esquizo.com/).  
Realization of various *websites* and corporate images (Digital Events, les Cols, eLearning WORKSHOPS).

*2000-2002*  
**Creative Director** in IT&C, *e-commerce* and Internet services company:  
Coordination of the team of designers and *webmasters* for the realization of both the corporate image and *webs* of all kinds from virtual stores such as [bikercom.com] (http://www.bikercom.com/ "Store of accessories for motorcycles") or portals such as [mortadeloyfilemon.com] and Philemon - official website").

*1999*  
**Multimedia developer at Catalan Encyclopedia:**  
Multimedia development in the work Routes of Catalonia, collection of 28 CDRoms co-edited by El Periódi, Enciclopedia Catalana and TV3.  
Development in the [Multimedia Summer Notebooks] (http://www.grec.net/home/escolar/PRIMARIA/qestiucd8.htm).

*1998*  
**Teacher of graphic and multimedia computer science** (Photoshop, FreeHand, Internet) at the Esbes Formació and Doménech Formació academies.  
***Freelance:***  
Creation of several educational interactive for the Municipal Institute of People with Disabilities.  
Integrator under Macromedia Director in an interactive game (CD-Rom) for Particular Signs.  
Development of various corporate CD-Roms in Spain Biz Point.  
Webmaster and creator of the Internet domain [xarop.com](http://www.xarop.com/).

*1997*  
**Multimedia Integrator and Programmer** at Somni Systems:  
CD-Roms: Summer Notebooks for the Catalan Encyclopedia, The Great Encyclopedia of Rock for the magazine Man and the interactive demonstration of Zeta Multimedia products.

*1996-97*  
**Technician and designer** Multimedia at LINKS international publishing house**:**  
Elaboration of the CD-Rom Architectural Design, Interior Spaces and European Furniture.

*1995-96*  
***Freelance:***  
Collaboration in the implementation of several multimedia projects (CD-Rom and *websites*)

**TRAINING**

*2003*  
**Postgraduate in Multimedia Programming** (Pompeu Fabra University): PHP-MySQL, actionscript, javascript, Lingo.  
Course of **Management Skills** in Barcelona Active.

*1995-99*  
**Official Graphic Design Degree at the E.A.A.O.A. Lotja.**

*1995-96*  
**Technician in Multimedia treatments**, studies in ITES-Image and only (multimedia projects).

*1995*  
Supervisor of PC systems, Barcelona Activa (200h).

*1992*  
Computer aided design (AUTOCAD) at CENEC.

*1983-88*  
B.U.P. and COU in the I.B. Montserrat de Barcelona.

*COMPUTER SCIENCE*  
Design and self-publishing: PhotoShop, Fireworks, FreeHand, Illustrator, Quark XPress, ...  
Multimedia: Flash/ActionScript, Director/Lingo, Adobe Premiere and other audio-video editors.  
Web Development: Dreamweaver, HTML, DHTML, javascript, PHP, MySQL.  
Office: Microsoft Office, Open Office, Google Docs.  
Environments: PC-Windows and Apple Macintosh.

*IDIOMS*  
English  
English: medium-high level.  
Italian: medium level.  
Swedish: basic level.

*OTHER*  
Own multimedia computer equipment (audio and video editing, CD-Rom-DVD production, *web* and multimedia development)  
Possibility to work as *freelance* or tele-work.
